title: Wynncraft Heavenly Mythic Box
description: Retextures Mythic item boxes to be larger, white-gold, and have a large flare to make them easier to spot.
body:
Replaces the texture of Mythic Item Boxes with a larger white-gold sparkly model to make it harder to miss and more of a spectacle to find.

---
This pack requires [Wynntils](https://modrinth.com/mod/wynntils) or [Server Pack Unlocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-pack-unlocker) or some other mod that allows you to place it above the server's resource pack.

---

Credit to BlueTheSniper for the textures, please don't bother them if this pack breaks, instead message LogicalSpaghetti on Discord.
